caption: A man is positioned in a recording studio against a background of dark grey, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a grey t-shirt, over-ear black headphones, and a grey baseball cap featuring a logo of a red and white stylized creature's head. A professional Blue brand microphone, mounted on a shock mount with the word "Blue" visible on the arm, is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. He begins by raising his right hand with fingers spread, then brings his hand closer to his face, before eventually lowering his arms as he continues to speak into the microphone. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment.
